description_long: This figure depicts an adult pedestrian dressed in an elaborate, military-inspired uniform with ornate gold trim and decorative elements. The outfit features a long, double-breasted coat with epaulets, gold buttons, and intricate rope detailing, complemented by a high-collared shirt and a sash across the chest. The individual wears a peaked cap with a band and a visor, and their hands are gloved. The lower half consists of fitted trousers and high-heeled shoes, giving a formal and authoritative appearance. The overall attire is highly stylized, with a strong emphasis on ceremonial and decorative features. The figure's posture is upright and composed, suggesting confidence and discipline.
description: A formally dressed adult in a detailed, military-style uniform with ornate decorations, peaked cap, gloves, and high-heeled shoes, standing upright.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the long coat's ornate back detailing, epaulets, and decorative ropes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the coat's length, fitted silhouette, and the profile of the cap and shoes.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the double-breasted coat, sash, gold buttons, gloves, and formal posture.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the coat's drape and the figure's profile.
attribute_clothing_type: military-style formal uniform with long coat, epaulets, sash, gloves, and peaked cap
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair, tucked under cap
